analysis.reasoning: Core message: The Russian MFA condemns alleged deliberate violent actions by US police against Russian journalists in Portland, calling it reprehensible and contrary to US obligations and its professed mentorship on press freedom and democracy. Evaluation: RU1 (The West is immoral, hostile, decadent) — supported. The tweet portrays the US as hypocritical and hostile (violence against journalists), violating its own stated values, and positions Russians as victims, fitting RU1. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) — not present; no promotion of multilateral alternatives or non-Western cooperation. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) — not present; no claim of Russia aiding others or promoting peace. RU4 (Russian history admirable) — not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) — not addressed. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature) — not relevant. Conclusion: Only RU1 applies.
